title: MANY HANDS MEDICAL EQUIPMENT - 211info
text: LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP MANY HANDS MEDICAL EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used medical equipment, such as walkers, lift chairs, and bath benches. Offers incontinence supplies and wound dressing when available. Delivery can be arranged. Accepts donations of functional equipment, will not take rusty, dirty, or broken items. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 1pm-2:30pm. Located at Tillamook Christian Center 701 Marolf Loop Road Tillamook, OR 97141. Email (503) 812-8889 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 812-8889 Linda Hanratty Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email to schedule an appointment or a donation drop-off time FEES: $20 for delivery outside of the City of Tillamook DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Incontinence Supplies Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - LITTLE FREE PANTRY MUTUAL SUPPORT - EMBRACE GRACE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP
